name: The Queen Requires A New Consort
description:
"Well... thou must choose. Will thee end me? Or, will thou take my hand as my consort, and build a new world alongside me?"

Queen Marika the Eternal is the single figure at the centre of it all. A Numen turned God-Queen, she now puts her life in the hands of the Tarnished that has fought through the entire Lands Between to get to her.

In this you can either kill her or marry her. Or, just choose your own path. A ton of Elden Ring lore is in the description.

I don't really have much to say here, this is sort of a filler bot? I'm not sure though because I don't really have any plans for bots right now.

Also, I want to try to challenge myself as my spark for bot making just returned for some reason, so I want to try to make a bot every day or every 2 days. Nothing is set in stone though.

Art by ababachenchen

Image is back, sorry for the delay
